footerTagline: Remove image backgrounds right in your browser.
privacyIntro: cutbg is built so your photos never have to trust a server in the first place.
privacyDeviceHeading: Your image never leaves your device
privacyDeviceBody: Background removal runs entirely in your browser: the image-segmentation model downloads to your device and runs inference locally, via WebGPU or WASM. This app has no server endpoint that accepts images, so an uploaded photo physically cannot be sent to a server.
privacyAnalyticsBody: We use Umami and Cloudflare Web Analytics to collect anonymous, aggregate usage statistics (e.g. visit counts and completed processing runs). Neither service ever receives your image content or personal data.
privacyStorageBody: This site stores only your chosen processing quality mode in your browser's localStorage. Analytics scripts may use their own technical cookies to count unique visits, without identifying you personally.
privacyContactBody: If you have privacy questions, reach out to us on Telegram.
heroSubheadline: Upload a photo — get a transparent PNG right in your browser. No server upload, no account.
heroFeatureClientBody: Processing happens locally, in your browser. Your image never leaves your device.
heroFeatureFreeBody: No accounts, subscriptions, or hidden limits — just upload a photo.
heroFeatureFastBody: The segmentation model loads once and processes photos in seconds.
processingModeMemoryWarning: High memory use. Requires WebGPU; automatically falls back to IS-Net Fast.
processingFallbackNotice: BEN2 could not run on this device. Your image was kept and processed once with IS-Net Fast.
processingMethodLabel: How should the foreground be identified?
automaticMethodHint: Choose a model and let it detect the foreground automatically.
guidedMethodHint: Guide lightweight SlimSAM when the foreground is ambiguous.
guidedMethodMeta: SlimSAM q8 · ≈14 MB · WASM · one image
guidedUploadHint: Guided mode is selected. Upload one image, then mark the object you want to keep.
guidedEntry: Select an object with a point or box
guidedHint: Choose Point and click the object, or draw a Box around it. Everything stays in this browser.
guidedLayersHint: Each object keeps its own points, box, strokes, and mask. The blue kept areas from all objects are combined in the final result.
guidedCandidatesHint: SlimSAM proposes up to three masks. Its quality estimate ranks them but is not an accuracy percentage—choose the blue preview that best matches the object.
guidedCandidateSame: Same pixels as the recommended alternative
guidedCandidateDifference: Differs from the recommended alternative by {difference}% of pixels
guidedCandidateSelected: Alternative {number} selected. The blue kept-area preview has been updated.
guidedLayerActionsHint: Clear prompts keeps this object slot but removes its points, box, strokes, and mask. Remove object deletes the entire object from the combined result.
guidedShortcutHint: Shortcuts while this editor is active: Ctrl/Cmd+Z to undo; Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+Z or Ctrl/Cmd+Y to redo.
guidedCanvasAlt: Source image for guided object selection
guidedPredictingMask: Building the mask from your prompt…
guidedReady: Choose a point or draw a box on the image.
guidedPreviewReady: Mask ready. Accept it or choose another prompt.
guidedMaskLegend: Blue overlay shows the object that will be kept.
guidedError: Guided selection failed. Try the prompt again or cancel.
uploadPrompt: Drag and drop an image, paste from clipboard, or
uploadPreparingHint: Reading files in your browser. Processing will start automatically.
batchWorkspaceHint: Add files to the queue and select a finished image to adjust it.
batchEditorEmpty: Select a finished image from the list below to adjust its background, refine the mask, or download it.
batchImagesHint: Files stay in the order you added them. New images appear at the end of the list.
unsavedBackground: Unsaved background — save to update the download.
batchQualityHint: Reprocessing keeps this item's saved {mode} mode. The quality setting applies to images added after you change it.
beforeAfterAlt: Image before and after background removal
maskAddDescription: Paint fully opaque — keeps the area even where the model removed it.
maskEraseDescription: Paint fully transparent — removes the area even where the model kept it.
maskRestoreDescription: Restore the model's original edge — useful for soft details such as hair.
maskCanvas: Mask correction canvas — drag to paint corrections
stateResult: Background removed. Result ready to review and download.
stateCorrecting: Editing mask corrections. Add, erase, or restore an area, then choose Done.
uploadUnsupported: Unsupported file format “{format}”. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
uploadTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 20 MB.
uploadResolutionError: The image could not be resized to the supported resolution.
aboutIntro: A free, anonymous background-removal tool that never sends your image anywhere.
aboutHowBody: cutbg runs the entire background-removal pipeline on your own device. When you upload a photo, an image-segmentation model (IS-Net, an open-source neural network) loads directly in your browser and runs inference in a background thread — using your GPU via WebGPU when available, falling back to a WASM CPU path otherwise. Your image is never uploaded to a server, because this app has no server endpoint that accepts images at all.
aboutTechBody: Built with TanStack Start (React 19, TanStack Router) for server-rendered page shells, Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui for the interface, and Transformers.js with ONNX Runtime Web for in-browser ML inference. The whole stack is self-hosted on a small VPS behind Nginx, with privacy-respecting analytics (Umami, Cloudflare Web Analytics) covering aggregate usage only — no personal data, no image content, ever leaves your device.
aboutAuthorBody: Built and maintained by v.godlevskiy, as an independent, self-hosted project — no company, no third-party tracking beyond the aggregate analytics described above.
productPhotoTitle: Remove the background from a product photo
productPhotoLead: Remove the background from a product photo — a clean, marketplace-ready shot in seconds, right in your browser.
productPhotoBody1: Listings on Amazon, eBay, Etsy, or your own Shopify store usually need the product shown on a clean, solid or transparent background — without a cluttered room, table shadows, or random objects in frame. Upload your product photo and the background is removed locally, on your device: the file is never sent anywhere, processing happens right in the browser.
productPhotoBody2: The result is a PNG with a transparent background that you can upload directly (if the marketplace accepts transparency) or place over any solid color in an image editor. Works with photos taken on a phone, with no sign-up and no limit on how many products you process.
productPhotoExampleAlt: Product photo before and after background removal
productPhotoExampleCaption: Before, on the left: the original product photo on a plain background. After, on the right: the result once the background is removed.
documentPhotoTitle: Remove the background from an ID photo
documentPhotoLead: Remove the background from an ID/document photo — a clean cutout you can place on any required background color yourself, processed entirely in your browser.
documentPhotoBody1: Passports, visas, ID badges, and application forms often require a photo on a strictly specified background — white, light blue, or gray. If your photo was taken at home or on a phone and the background is uneven or the wrong color, upload it here: the tool removes the current background, leaving a transparent PNG with clean edges around your face and shoulders.
documentPhotoBody2: Note that the tool only removes the background — it doesn't automatically add the required color back in. Place the transparent result over the correct solid background in any image editor before printing it or uploading it to a form. Processing happens locally, so your photo never leaves your device.
documentPhotoExampleAlt: ID photo before and after background removal
documentPhotoExampleCaption: Before, on the left: the photo prior to processing. After, on the right: background removed and ready for the required color to be added behind it.
logoTitle: Remove the background from a logo
logoLead: Remove the background from a logo — turn a flat JPG/PNG into a transparent PNG ready to overlay on any surface, processed entirely in your browser.
logoBody1: Logos often arrive as a plain image with a solid white or colored background — awkward to drop onto a presentation slide, a social media template, or product packaging. Upload the image with your logo, and the background around it is removed, leaving a clean mark on a transparent base.
logoBody2: The tool works best on logos with sharp edges and a contrasting background; for complex gradient backdrops, check the result closely before using it. The file isn't uploaded to any server — all processing happens on your device.
logoExampleAlt: Logo before and after background removal
logoExampleCaption: Before, on the left: the logo on its original background. After, on the right: the same logo with a transparent background.
avatarTitle: Remove the background from an avatar
avatarLead: Remove the background for a social profile picture — a clean cutout ready for a new background or platform frame, processed entirely in your browser.
avatarBody1: A messaging app, social network, or company site avatar usually needs a portrait without a distracting background — a room, a street, or random people nearby. Upload your photo and the background around the silhouette is removed, leaving a transparent PNG that fits neatly into a round or square profile frame.
avatarBody2: Use the transparent result as-is if the platform supports transparency, or place it over a solid or brand color. Processing happens locally: your photo is never sent to a server and isn't stored anywhere except your own device.
avatarExampleAlt: Avatar photo before and after background removal
avatarExampleCaption: Before, on the left: the photo prior to processing. After, on the right: the finished silhouette on a transparent background.
